title: Hospital Discharge Bottleneck
background: A hospital has bed shortages because patient discharges are consistently delayed.
candidate_prompt: How would you evaluate the situation and recommend what the organization should do next?
good_answer_includes: Maps the end-to-end process and bottlenecks
Identifies capacity, staffing, quality, and handoff issues
Uses metrics such as cycle time, throughput, and error rate
great_answer_includes: Considers technology, incentives, and change management
interviewer_notes: A strong candidate should use a clear operations structure, isolate the most important drivers, and connect the recommendation to business impact.
